{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Starhammer VI: Son of Starhammer
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer VI: Son of Starhammer]] is a movie.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c20">''The Engineer'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
